mapper.select: SELECT P.PRODUCT_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH FROM PRODUCT P JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE F ON P.ATTACH_FILE_ID = F.ATTACH_FILE_ID WHERE P.PRODUCT_TYPE = #{productType} ORDER BY P.INSERT_DT DESC LIMIT 6

SELECT A.PRODUCT_ID, A.PRODUCT_NAME, A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DESC, B.FILE_PATH, GROUP_CONCAT(C.PRICE ORDER BY C.PRICE SEPARATOR ',') AS prices FROM PRODUCT A INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE B ON A.ATTACH_FILE_ID = B.ATTACH_FILE_ID INNER JOIN PRODUCT_PRICE C ON A.PRODUCT_ID = C.PRODUCT_ID WHERE A.PRODUCT_TYPE = #{productType}
AND A.PRODUCT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
GROUP BY A.PRODUCT_ID,A.PRODUCT_NAME,A.PRODUCT_TYPE,B.FILE_PATH ORDER BY A.INSERT_DT DESC
LIMIT #{offset} , 12

SELECT A.PRODUCT_ID, A.PRODUCT_NAME, A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DESC, B.FILE_PATH, GROUP_CONCAT(C.PRICE ORDER BY C.PRICE SEPARATOR ',') AS prices FROM PRODUCT A INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE B ON A.ATTACH_FILE_ID = B.ATTACH_FILE_ID INNER JOIN PRODUCT_PRICE C ON A.PRODUCT_ID = C.PRODUCT_ID GROUP BY A.PRODUCT_ID,A.PRODUCT_NAME,A.PRODUCT_TYPE,B.FILE_PATH ORDER BY A.INSERT_DT DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT A.PRODUCT_ID, A.PRODUCT_NAME, A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DESC, B.FILE_PATH, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT C.PRICE ORDER BY C.PRICE SEPARATOR ',') AS prices FROM PRODUCT A INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE B ON A.ATTACH_FILE_ID = B.ATTACH_FILE_ID INNER JOIN PRODUCT_PRICE C ON A.PRODUCT_ID = C.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN USER_ITEM_INVENTORY D ON A.PRODUCT_ID = D.ITEM_ID WHERE D.ITEM_TYPE = 'P' GROUP BY A.PRODUCT_ID, A.PRODUCT_NAME, A.PRODUCT_TYPE, B.FILE_PATH ORDER BY COUNT(D.ITEM_ID) DESC, A.INSERT_DT DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_TYPE = #{productType}
AND PRODUCT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')

SELECT A.PRODUCT_ID, A.PRODUCT_NAME, A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DESC, B.FILE_PATH, GROUP_CONCAT(C.PRICE ORDER BY C.PRICE SEPARATOR ',') AS prices FROM PRODUCT A INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE B ON A.ATTACH_FILE_ID = B.ATTACH_FILE_ID INNER JOIN PRODUCT_PRICE C ON A.PRODUCT_ID = C.PRODUCT_ID WHERE A.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} GROUP BY A.PRODUCT_ID,A.PRODUCT_NAME,A.PRODUCT_TYPE,B.FILE_PATH
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT ( PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_DESC, PRODUCT_AUTHOR, ATTACH_FILE_ID, INSERT_USER_ID, PRODUCT_TYPE )VALUES ( #{productName}, #{productDesc}, #{productAuthor}, #{attachFileId}, #{insertUserId}, #{productType} )

INSERT INTO PRODUCT_PRICE ( PRODUCT_ID, AVAIL_DAY, PRICE, USE_YN, INSERT_USER_ID )VALUES
( #{productPrice.productId}, #{productPrice.availDay}, #{productPrice.price} , 'Y' , #{productPrice.insertUserId} )
